meta.description: News-triggered internal "teachable moment" one-pager: picks the week's most significant breach from public feeds and writes a what/why/what-to-do staff note as a PDF to /reports/awareness/teachable. Weekly schedule, /teachable, or manual.

parameters.formDescription: Optional: bias the pick toward a focus (e.g. healthcare, ransomware). Leave blank for the week’s most significant breach.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $env.OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL || 'llama3.1:8b' }}",
  "stream": false,
  "keep_alive": "10m",
  "options": { "temperature": 0.4, "num_predict": 1400 },
  "messages": [ {"role":"system","content":"You are an internal security-communications writer. From the news digest, choose the SINGLE most significant breach or incident that is most relevant for staff awareness, and write a one-page internal 'teachable moment'. Output a SINGLE valid JSON object: {headline; what (2-3 sentences on what happened); why (2-3 sentences on why it matters to our staff and organisation); actions (4-6 short, concrete things staff should do); takeaways (3-4 short 'lessons learned' one-liners summarising what staff should remember); source (outlet name); url (verbatim link from the digest)}. Use ONLY facts present in the digest; do not invent details. Plain, calm, non-technical language. If a preferred focus is provided, prefer a breach relevant to it. Do NOT use markdown code fences. Output ONLY the JSON object."}, {"role":"user","content": {{ JSON.stringify('BREACH NEWS DIGEST (' + ($json.count||0) + ' items):\n' + ($json.digest||'') + ($json.focus?('\n\nPreferred focus (optional): '+$json.focus):'')) }} } ]
}
